name: Crazy Washing Machine
developer: Камин Игнат Алексеевич, Kamin Ignat Alekseevich, Elisey Cherkashin Alekseevich
publisher: Камин Игнат Алексеевич, Kamin Ignat Alekseevich
short_description: You are a Soviet Bear and you’ve decided laundry a Brick! For us, Humans it is obvious than this idea threatens this and it’s better not to try to do it. But how unhappy Bear will know it? Well, he still has to learn what will be if to try to wash a brick.
detailed_description:
You are a Bear and you’ve decided laundry a Brick!
For us, Humans it is obvious than this idea threatens this and it’s better not to try to do it.
But how unhappy Bear will know it?
Well, he still has to learn what will be if to try to wash a brick.
That what hasn’t killed us, will make us stronger…

If necessary, in this game there are cheat codes for quick passage.

In the game, you can get 8 Achievements!

Let's Wash Your Bricks!
